text: Being here, I feel a curious blend of anticipation and inquisitiveness. The first room, bustling with people engaged in discussion or absorbed in their work, evokes in me the thrill of collective inquiry and the subtle tension of shared striving. Stepping towards the vivid, boldly-lettered wall in the next scene, I sense the excitement of creativity and innovation. I am surrounded by ideas in motion—the spirit of research and development. It makes me reflect on the progress we make, together and alone, as thinking, wondering beings.
